changes: Doton: Reduction to damage taken reduced from 25% to 20%.
First Generation: Potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Second Generation: Potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Third Generation: Potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Fourth Generation: Potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Full Metal Field: Potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Full Metal Field: Recast time reduced from 32 to 30 seconds.
Burst: Barrier strength increased from 12,000 to 15,000 potency.
Mountain Buster: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Slipstream: Movement speed increase effect now applies to self in addition to allies.
Glare III: Text updated regarding Glare IV.
Seraph Strike: Text regarding Glare IV removed.
Afflatus Purgation: Healing over time potency of Temperance reduced from 6,000 to 4,000.
Glare IV: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Summon Seraph: Recovery via healing actions granted by Seraphic Illumination reduced from 20% to 10%.
Microcosmos: HP recovered reduced from 5,000 potency + 25% damage to 4,000 potency + 20% damage.
